channel.title: ICS Threat Intelligence on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in ICS Threat Intelligence on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001) Practice Test - SimeonOnSecurity
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+" , "SOT-001" , "practice test" , "OT security" , "ICS security" , "industrial control systems"
item.description: Prepare for the CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001) exam with our comprehensive practice test. Test your knowledge of OT systems and safety foundations, OT risk management, OT threat intelligence, OT cybersecurity architecture, OT security operations, and OT incident management.
